chain_of_thought: [INCORRECT] Move only one block to the corner. [CORRECT] All three blocks (blue, red, yellow) need to be moved to the top left corner.
[INCORRECT] Place the green block on the yellow bowl. [CORRECT] The yellow block goes on the green bowl, not the other way around.
[INCORRECT] Move the darkest block. [CORRECT] The light colored block is yellow, not blue or red.
[INCORRECT] Place blocks side by side. [CORRECT] Stacking means placing one block on top of another.
[INCORRECT] Group all blocks together. [CORRECT] Only the blue objects (blue block and blue bowl) need to be grouped.
[INCORRECT] Place blocks in random bowls. [CORRECT] Each block must go in the bowl matching its own color.
[INCORRECT] Place all blocks in the same corner. [CORRECT] Each block must go in a different corner.
